name: MikroTik GPeR-IP67-Case
title: MikroTik GPeR-IP67-Case
short_description: IP68 Outdoor Enclosure for the GPeR.
description: The MikroTik GPeR-IP67-Case is a robust outdoor enclosure designed to protect MikroTik GPeR units in demanding environments. While its name suggests an IP67 rating, real-world testing has confirmed compliance with the even stricter IP68 standard. This ensures complete protection against dust and extended immersion in water, making it suitable for harsh outdoor conditions. The case is manufactured from durable materials and engineered to keep your networking equipment safe, extending the reliability and lifespan of your GPeR installations. Built for challenging environments, the GPeR-IP67-Case is rated to operate in a wide temperature range from −40 °C to +70 °C. These features guarantee stable performance in extreme climates, whether in freezing cold or intense heat.

detailed_description.heading: Rugged Protection
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik GPeR-IP67-Case is a robust outdoor enclosure designed to protect MikroTik GPeR units in demanding environments. While its name suggests an IP67 rating, real-world testing has confirmed compliance with the even stricter IP68 standard. This ensures complete protection against dust and extended immersion in water, making it suitable for harsh outdoor conditions. The case is manufactured from durable materials and engineered to keep your networking equipment safe, extending the reliability and lifespan of your GPeR installations. Built for challenging environments, the GPeR-IP67-Case is rated to operate in a wide temperature range from −40 °C to +70 °C. These features guarantee stable performance in extreme climates, whether in freezing cold or intense heat.

detailed_description.heading: Flexible Deployment
detailed_description.text: The case is designed for easy and flexible mounting, whether on poles or walls, making it adaptable to a wide variety of deployment scenarios. Its sealed design shields sensitive electronics from moisture, dust, and debris, allowing you to deploy Ethernet repeaters in places where conventional housings would fail. With this level of durability, the GPeR-IP67-Case is an excellent choice for mission-critical outdoor network extensions. It is especially suitable for rugged environments such as maintenance shafts and industrial perimeters. Lightweight yet highly protective, the GPeR-IP67-Case allows you to deploy MikroTik GPeR units with confidence, knowing they are well-protected against environmental challenges.

items.name: Power Method
items.value: 24V Passive PoE, 48V Passive PoE, 802.3af PoE, 802.3at PoE+

comments.name: Steve
comments.text: Very nicely made bit of kit, perfect for the GPER
